subject: Son Goku — charging a ki blast in orange gi with dark spiky hair, standing in fighting stance
description: A male figure with dark spiky hair stands in a wide fighting stance, charging a glowing golden ki energy attack in his outstretched hands. He wears an orange martial arts gi with a dark undershirt and dark belt. The figure is surrounded by a burst of yellow-green ki energy radiating outward. The background shows a partial glimpse of a brick or stone structure, consistent with a training ground or village setting. The image is low-resolution and bears a watermark, but the figure's iconic silhouette and design are unmistakable as Goku from Dragon Ball. The overall mood is one of intense power buildup and combat readiness.
foreground: Spiky-haired male fighter in orange gi charging glowing ki energy in outstretched hands
background: Yellow-green ki energy burst with partial stone building visible
emotion: determined and powerful — wide stance, intense focus, energy building in hands
